sql.value: select id, provider_name, provider_type, api_base_url, api_key, sort, enable_status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted, revision from ai_model_provider where is_deleted=0 #[and enable_status = :enableStatus] #[and provider_name like :providerName] #[and provider_type like :providerType] order by sort desc, id desc
